exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your art portfolio forward
items: Gather and organize 20-30 of your best existing artworks from the past 2-3 years
Document each artwork with high-quality photographs taken in consistent lighting conditions
Create a detailed inventory spreadsheet listing all your artworks with dimensions, medium, year, and condition notes
Write a concise artist statement draft (150-200 words) that explains your artistic vision and creative process
Research and identify 5-7 target art schools, galleries, or professional opportunities that align with your artistic style and career goals
Set up a dedicated workspace or studio area specifically for portfolio development and artwork storage
